questions.question: 1 (a) The structures of five organic compounds, A, B, C, D and E, are shown. Answer the questions that follow. Each letter may be used once, more than once or not at all. HC H H C A H H CC O O H H C CC C H H H H H H HC H H C B H H CH H H H HC H H CC O O H H HC H H C DE H H CO H H H H (i) Give the letter of the compound that is propan-1-ol. ...........................................
